name: Create a post
label: Create a post
description: Creates, publishes, schedules, or saves a social media post.

mappableParameters.name: message
mappableParameters.label: Message
mappableParameters.help: The root post text. It may be empty for media-only posts.

mappableParameters.name: accountIds
mappableParameters.label: Account IDs
mappableParameters.help: One or more connected SimplePost account IDs. Use the List Accounts module to load them.

mappableParameters.name: scheduledFor
mappableParameters.label: Scheduled for
mappableParameters.help: Required when Posting mode is Schedule.

mappableParameters.name: thread
mappableParameters.label: Thread
mappableParameters.help: Optional array of additional thread segments.

mappableParameters.name: accountOptions
mappableParameters.label: Account options
mappableParameters.help: Optional platform settings keyed by account ID.

mappableParameters.name: accountOverrides
mappableParameters.label: Account overrides
mappableParameters.help: Optional per-account content overrides keyed by account ID.

mappableParameters.name: repost
mappableParameters.label: Repost
mappableParameters.help: Optional repost settings with enabled and delayHours.

mappableParameters.name: idempotencyKey
mappableParameters.label: Idempotency key
mappableParameters.help: Use a stable unique value to prevent duplicate posts when Make retries.
